parameters.name: q
parameters.value: modifiedTime > '{{ new Date(Date.now() - 24*60*60*1000).toISOString() }}' and trashed = false

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: modifiedTime > '{{ new Date(Date.now() - 7*24*60*60*1000).toISOString() }}' and trashed = false and (name contains 'SOP' or name contains 'Prozess' or name contains 'Strategie' or name contains 'KPI' or name contains 'Sales' or name contains 'Marketing' or name contains 'Halleluja')

nodes.name: Drive: Key Docs (7 Tage)
nodes.notes: ⚠️ Keywords anpassen an eure wichtigsten Dokument-Typen
